title: Presses de la Cité
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
[[File:Presses_logo.jpg|thumb|right|Logo]]
'''Presses de la Cité''' is a [[Wikipedia:France|French]] publishing company responsible for printing the [[Wikipedia:French language|French]] translations of the hardcover ''[[Star Wars]]'' novels.

{{Company-stub|real}}
